_note: Ready-to-paste pilot post. Copy this object (without _note) into the `posts` array in posts.json once ai_phone_glow_01.mp4 is in assets/ai-generated/approved/. It renders the AI clip with hook + song bed + CTA + caption. Nothing is posted.
hook: This is what YOUR name sounds like
caption: press play 🎶 hearing your own name in a song hits different 💗
cta: Hear your name → link in bio
ai_prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic extreme close-up of a modern smartphone lying on a soft cream blanket, glowing warmly in a dim cozy room, gentle warm light pulsing softly, blurred fairy-light bokeh in the background, shallow depth of field, intimate, realistic, no text on screen.
ai_negative_prompt: children, people, faces, readable screen text, brand logos, watermark, distorted shapes, low quality
